---

## 1. Role Justification

The Senior Engine Engineer is responsible for engine architecture, memory management, physics systems, platform abstraction, and profiling infrastructure. This is a P0 hire required for Stage 5 (Full Production). The role sits under Dmitri Volkov's direction, owning the deepest layer of the technology stack — everything below the gameplay layer. This includes custom allocators, lock-free data structures, physics synchronization for multiplayer, GPU/CPU profiling tools, and the platform abstraction layer that enables iOS Metal + Android Vulkan support from a single codebase.

This hire is critical because engine-level decisions are the hardest to change post-implementation. A senior engineer with proven experience at companies like Epic Games ensures the engine foundation is built correctly from day one.

**Pipeline Stages Owned:** 2 (Engine Architecture), 3 (Memory/Physics Design), 5 (Engine Implementation), 6 (Engine Code Review)

## 2. Required Competencies (weighted)

| C++ Engine Development              | 30%    | ≥ 4.5/5           | Deep-dive coding challenge                |
| Memory Management & Optimization    | 20%    | ≥ 4/5             | Custom allocator design exercise          |
| Physics Systems & Synchronization   | 15%    | ≥ 4/5             | Physics system design interview           |
| Platform Abstraction (Metal/Vulkan) | 15%    | ≥ 4/5             | Cross-platform architecture case study    |
| Profiling & Performance Analysis    | 10%    | ≥ 3.5/5           | Profiling tool design exercise            |
| Code Review & Mentoring             | 10%    | ≥ 3.5/5           | Behavioral interview + code review sample |

---

## 3. Must-Have Qualifications

- 6+ years engine development experience with C++
- Custom allocator design and memory fragmentation analysis
- Lock-free data structures and concurrent programming
- Physics system implementation (rigid body, collision detection)
- Platform abstraction layer design (Metal + Vulkan)
- CPU/GPU profiling tool development
- Experience with shipped game titles on mobile platforms

---

## 4. Nice-to-Have Qualifications

- Contributions to open-source game engines (Unreal, Godot)
- Experience with deterministic physics for multiplayer
- Published technical papers on engine optimization
- Experience mentoring junior engine engineers
